title: Coinbase investing into stablecoin reserves ETF issued by ProShares
snippet: The fund, called ProShares GENIUS Money Market ETF, has $22 billion in assets under management and launched this year.

title: SEC makes digital assets strategic priority through 2030
snippet: The regulator’s five-year roadmap calls for clearer crypto rules, support for tokenization and a framework for staking and onchain markets.

title: UK Regulator Warns Soccer Clubs Over Unauthorized Crypto Sponsorship Deals
snippet: The FCA has warned Premier League clubs that partnerships with unlicensed crypto firms could expose fans to unregulated trading platforms.

title: Btiget introduces trading in US stocks
snippet: Bitget, the world’s leading Universal Exchange (UEX), has announced the launch of Bitget Stocks 2.0, an upgraded tokenized stock spot product designed to improve liquidity, asset transparency, and capital efficiency for tokenized equity trading.

title: Hashgraph rolls out tokenization trading platform

title: Mastercard rolls out support for stablecoin settlement
snippet: Mastercard is rolling out settlement support for a range of US stablecoins operating across multiple blockchain platforms.

title: RedotPay enters B2B market
snippet: RedotPay, a global stablecoin-based payment fintech company serving over 7 million users across 100+ countries, today announced the launch of RedotPay Connect at Money20/20 Europe, marking the company’s first dedicated B2B product since inception and a major step into enterprise payments.

title: Coinbase invests in ProShares ETF tailored for stablecoin reserve assets
snippet: The exchange has invested an undisclosed amount in ProShares’ Treasury-focused ETF built for the post-GENIUS era as lawmakers debate whether stablecoin issuers can offer yield-bearing products.

snippet: Regulators in the EU, US and elsewhere are moving toward combinations of liquidity and capital thresholds for stablecoin issuers, but the calibration varies widely. title: Zama accelerates compliance after court lifts $12.5M USDC freeze
snippet: Privacy protocol Zama says it will accelerate compliance measures after a court lifted a $12.5 million USDC freeze tied to an unrelated legal dispute.

title: New York and EU’s finance watchdogs team up to police stablecoins
snippet: Some of the information that New York and the European Union’s watchdogs will share includes the issued stablecoins, total volume in circulation and the number of holders.
